episode_title: From AI demos to usable systems: Clearforge Weekly AI Briefing
episode_description: This week Clearforge explains Canva AI 2.0, Inkling open weights, GitHub AI security detections, Gemini Notebook code execution, GPT-Red, AI task economics, consumer safeguards and EU platform rules. Read the full guide at https://clearforge-daily-brief.netlify.app/ and follow the podcast at https://open.spotify.com/show/033OE4kukRlRAdyj9thlIW.
